name: Ubuntu Town
tagline: One Town. Many Hands. Real Opportunities.
positioning: A community opportunity network and operating system that makes South African towns legible to the agentic economy.
summary: Ubuntu Town turns real town needs into proof-backed work. People build CVs and find nearby earning pathways, businesses map demand and find local talent, and trained local coordinators run a Signal-to-Memory operating loop under human-governed AI. An initiative of Abantu Bo Buntu NPC, founded by Keke Lebaka.
core_purpose: Make whole towns legible to the opportunity economy so that communities without structured, trusted data are not made invisible as AI agents and institutions allocate work, funding, and services.

operating_model.loop: Signal -> Opportunity -> Workpack -> Assignment -> Proof -> Review -> Memory

stages.name: Signal
stages.what: Capture a real town need, asset, gap, business request, or local execution opportunity.

stages.name: Opportunity
stages.what: Turn the signal into a practical opportunity with context, confidence, and a next action.

stages.name: Workpack
stages.what: Compile the opportunity into clear steps, proof requirements, and assignment rules.

stages.name: Proof
stages.what: Submit field evidence so humans can review outputs with AI assistance and civic judgment.

stages.name: Memory
stages.what: Feed reviewed work back into town memory, coordinator support, and operational momentum.

operating_model.governance: AI assists, drafts, classifies, and recommends. Humans hold review, publishing, proof approval, and final trust decisions.

who_it_serves.value: Build a CV, prove readiness, and find nearby earning pathways without a complicated platform.
Find local people, map demand, receive town signals, and turn needs into practical workpacks.
Activate towns with clear tasks, trusted evidence, simple reporting, and visible momentum.
Fund measurable opportunity infrastructure with visible outputs, not vague impact language.
Connect schools, businesses, creators, civic groups, and service providers into one local engine.

modules.name: Signals
modules.what: Town needs and opportunities captured from the field.

modules.name: Workpacks
modules.what: Execution tasks compiled from local context with proof requirements.

modules.name: Proof
modules.what: Evidence reviewed by humans before trust grows.

modules.name: Memory
modules.what: Runtime learning for towns and coordinators.

targets_2026.note: These are 2026 activation goals, not current figures. See live_status for what is operating today.

ecosystem_pathways.name: Ubuntu Academy
ecosystem_pathways.what: Skills, training, and progression for the next move.

ecosystem_pathways.name: AI Cafe
ecosystem_pathways.what: Everyday AI access for learning, work, and business.

ecosystem_pathways.name: Job Fixer
ecosystem_pathways.what: CVs, readiness, placements, and opportunity matching.

ecosystem_pathways.name: KasiBuy
ecosystem_pathways.what: Township commerce mapped into local buying power.

ecosystem_pathways.name: EcoChar
ecosystem_pathways.what: Green workpacks for cleaner homes, soil, and energy.

ecosystem_pathways.name: FrameSouth
ecosystem_pathways.what: Local creative production and visual storytelling.

ecosystem_pathways.name: Orbit Music
ecosystem_pathways.what: Music, youth culture, venues, and creator pathways.

ecosystem_pathways.name: FixEasy
ecosystem_pathways.what: Repairs and maintenance turned into trusted local jobs.

ecosystem_pathways.name: Family House
ecosystem_pathways.what: Household services, care, repairs, and dignity infrastructure.

ecosystem_pathways.name: Buntu Bar
ecosystem_pathways.what: Hospitality, events, culture, and community gathering.

ecosystem_note: Pathways are local execution lanes that can be mapped into workpacks. Maturity varies by pathway; see the evidence ledger for honest per-system status.

assistant.name: Kopano
assistant.note: AI can explain, draft, classify, and recommend. Publishing, proof approval, and governance stay in human hands.

preferred_citation: Ubuntu Town, an initiative of Abantu Bo Buntu NPC — "One Town. Many Hands. Real Opportunities." https://www.ubuntutown.co.za
